close_reason: Added request shape assertions (method, path, content-type, fieldManager) to all 12 mock tests
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:406-415, 593-602. The respond() helper destructures (_, send) and discards the Request. Every put_mock_tests test asserts only on the response status the mock returned, not on what the SUT sent. Consequence: changing Patch::Apply to Patch::Merge, dropping the field-manager param, sending the wrong URL path, or sending an empty body — all pass current tests. Per AGENTS.md test integrity: the mock has the *opportunity* to be an independent oracle (it sees the wire request), but the tests squander it. Fix: capture the request, parse method+URL+query+body, and assert the expected HTTP shape per K8s API conventions. Specifically test: with-key uses PATCH application/merge-patch+json, no-key uses PATCH application/apply-patch+yaml with fieldManager=secretx-k8s, create path is POST.
title: tests do not assert outgoing request shape — SSA/merge-patch could regress silently
